zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Mauduit於1123年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普時，她的父親William de Mauduit II32歲，母親Maude Hanslape45歲。她於1160年與Hamon de Wolverton Fitz Meinflin在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1184年在英國英格蘭享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Mauduit于1123年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普时，她的父亲William de Mauduit II32岁，母亲Maude Hanslape45岁。她于1160年与Hamon de Wolverton Fitz Meinflin在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1184年在英国英格兰享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mauduit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mawditt
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French mal-duit ‘badly brought up, ill educated’ (Latin male doctus).

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Mauduit was born in 1123, in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Mauduit II, was 32 and her mother, Maude Hanslape, was 45. She married Hamon de Wolverton Fitz Meinflin in 1160, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1184, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Mauduit est née en 1123, à Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Mauduit II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Maude Hanslape, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Hamon de Wolverton Fitz Meinflin en 1160, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1184, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Mauduit 1123 in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Mauduit II 32 und ihre Mutter Maude Hanslape 45. Sie hat 1160 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Hamon de Wolverton Fitz Meinflin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1184 im Alter von 61 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Mauduit è nata il nel 1123 nel Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de Mauduit II, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Maude Hanslape, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Hamon de Wolverton Fitz Meinflin nel 1160, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1184, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Mauduitが1123年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンスロペで生まれた時，父William de Mauduit IIは32歳，母Maude Hanslapeは45歳であった。1160年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでHamon de Wolverton Fitz Meinflinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1184年にイギリスイギリスで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Mauduit(이)가 1123년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 핸슬로프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Mauduit II(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maude Hanslape(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 Hamon de Wolverton Fitz Meinflin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1184년 영국 잉글랜드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Mauduit nasceu em 1123, em Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Mauduit II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Maude Hanslape, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Hamon de Wolverton Fitz Meinflin em 1160, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1184, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Mauduit родилась в 1123 г. в местности ханслоп, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Mauduit II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Maude Hanslape, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hamon de Wolverton Fitz Meinflin в 1160 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1184 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda Mauduit nació en 1123, en Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Mauduit II, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Maude Hanslape, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Hamon de Wolverton Fitz Meinflin en 1160, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1184, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años.
